# LoneStar Intelligence — AI Consulting for Texas Businesses
# https://www.lonestarintelligence.com

## About
LoneStar Intelligence is an AI consulting firm founded by Brett Pascall, based in Austin, Texas. We deliver hands-on AI training sessions, leadership AI summits, and GTM team enablement workshops to help Texas businesses adopt and scale artificial intelligence.

## Services
- Corporate Leadership AI Summit: Executive-level AI strategy and alignment session
- AI Enablement for GTM Teams: Hands-on AI workshop for marketing, sales, and revenue teams
- AI for Everyday Work: Org-wide AI productivity training for all employees

## Contact
Email: info@lonestarintelligence.com
Location: Austin, TX (serving Austin, Dallas, Houston, San Antonio)
